title: bidens deltoidea
intro: Bidens deltoidea, also known as bur marigold, is a flowering plant species native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bidens deltoidea include alleviating digestive problems, soothing sore throats, and reducing fever, among others. Herbal preparations of Bidens deltoidea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
